title: payment_watcher: stream.message().await has no timeout — hangs on stalled gRPC
description: relay/src/payment_watcher.rs:161 calls stream.message().await with no timeout. If the TCP connection to lightwalletd half-closes mid-stream (common under NAT or load balancers), the call blocks forever. The outer RECONNECT_DELAY_SECS path is never reached. The watcher silently stops scanning and activating subscriptions. Fix: wrap with tokio::time::timeout(Duration::from_secs(N), ...) and break the inner loop on timeout, falling through to the reconnect path.
close_reason: Fixed in round 31: 30s timeout added to stream.message() in payment_watcher
